disclosure: This is a static Annona demo dataset bundle bundled with the app. It is not live production data.

tables.name: customers
tables.description: Customer dimension rows used to resolve customer names, segments, and regions for the order-margin demo.

tables.name: orders
tables.description: Order header rows with booking date plus order-level freight and rebate values.

tables.name: order_lines
tables.description: Order line rows with SKU-level revenue and COGS facts that roll up into order margin.

tables.name: products
tables.description: Product dimension rows that map SKUs to supplier and category for cross-table reasoning.

relationships.name: orders_to_customers
relationships.description: Join each order header to its customer dimension row.

relationships.name: orders_to_order_lines
relationships.description: Join each order header to its line items.

relationships.name: order_lines_to_products
relationships.description: Join each order line SKU to the product dimension row.
